eventColors.title: eventColors
eventColors.description: Utility functions that map semantic color names to Tailwind CSS class strings for calendar event styling. Two opacity variants: `soft` for timed grids and `strong` for compact pills.

api.eventColorClass: Soft variant — translucent fills so grid lines stay visible. Best for WeekView, DayView, and Scheduler.
api.eventColorClassStrong: Stronger variant — more opaque for readability in compact pills. Best for MonthView.
api.hexToRgba: Convert a hex color to an rgba string with custom alpha. Useful for custom event colors.

types.title: Types
types.desc: TypeScript type signatures for event color utilities.

hex.title: Custom hex color
hex.desc: Convert any hex color to rgba for custom calendar events.
